originalTitle: Pope prioritises world's fastest-growing Catholic region in major Africa tour
title: Pope prioritises world's fastest-growing Catholic region in major Africa tour
content: Leo XIV wants the world's attention on a continent vital to the Church's future, an aide says.

originalTitle: Civilians feared killed after reports of air strike on Nigerian market
title: Civilians feared killed after reports of air strike on Nigerian market
content: The Nigerian Air Force has not addressed reports it struck a village market while targeting militants.

originalTitle: Djibouti's president wins unprecedented sixth term with 97.8% of vote
title: Djibouti's president wins unprecedented sixth term with 97.8% of vote
content: Ismail Omar Guelleh, 78, has extended his already 27-year rule in a poll boycotted by the main opposition candidates.

originalTitle: Who is Israel’s US envoy leading talks with Lebanon?
title: Who is Israel’s US envoy leading talks with Lebanon?
content: Israel's envoy to the US has far-right ties and has engaged in contentious rhetoric during Lebanese peace negotiations.

originalTitle: Sinner beats Alcaraz in straight sets to win Monte Carlo; reclaim No.1 spot
title: Sinner beats Alcaraz in straight sets to win Monte Carlo; reclaim No.1 spot
content: Jannik Sinner continues his title-winning run with a 7-6(5) 6-3 triumph and grabs top spot in ATP rankings.

originalTitle: ‘Terrible for foreign policy’: Trump attacks Pope Leo after peace appeal
title: ‘Terrible for foreign policy’: Trump attacks Pope Leo after peace appeal
content: Leo, ​who last year became the first US-born pope, has emerged as an outspoken critic of the US-Israeli ⁠war on Iran.

originalTitle: Orbán era swept away by Péter Magyar's Hungary election landslide
title: Orbán era swept away by Péter Magyar's Hungary election landslide
content: Viktor Orbán's 16-year rule is over, defeated by a 45-year-old ex-party insider who convinced a majority of Hungarians to oust him.

originalTitle: Viktor Orbán's Hungarian experiment runs out of steam
title: Viktor Orbán's Hungarian experiment runs out of steam
content: Péter Magyar's historic win offers peace for a country exhausted by the tensions of Viktor Orbán's rule,  Nick Thorpe reports from Budapest.

originalTitle: Trump's threat raises risks and leaves predicaments unchanged
title: Trump's threat raises risks and leaves predicaments unchanged
content: The conflict is now a test of wills - Iran’s capacity to absorb strikes versus Trump’s tolerance for the war's costs.

originalTitle: Man City have psychological edge over Arsenal - Rooney
title: Man City have psychological edge over Arsenal - Rooney
content: Wayne Rooney says Manchester City have the psychological edge over leaders Arsenal in the Premier League title race.

originalTitle: Will Romero's tears become the enduring image of Tottenham's season?
title: Will Romero's tears become the enduring image of Tottenham's season?
content: Cristian Romero's tears at Sunderland could prove the lasting image of Tottenham's season if it ends with relegation, writes Phil McNulty.

originalTitle: Will thrilling Scottish title race be decided on goal difference?
title: Will thrilling Scottish title race be decided on goal difference?
content: Rangers' 6-3 win over Falkirk extends the Ibrox side's advantage over leaders Heart of Midlothian and Celtic should the Scottish Premiership title be decided on goal difference.
